d: Shakir morphs into a wolf and smashes a tile, knocking the enemy there into the air, and dealing [[190%]]<ATK> damage to enemies within 2 tiles, during which he is [[unaffected|uncontrol]]. Shakir consumes [[60]] Energy per second to maintain his wolf shape. Shakir generates a Lupine Aura in a range of 2-tile while in the wolf shape, dealing damage to all enemies within the frontal radius of the arc with normal attacks. Allies within the range of Lupine Aura reduce [[20%]] taken damage and increase [[10]] Haste.
Reduces the allies' damage taken within Lupine Aura by [[20%]] and increases their Haste by [[15]].
Reduces the allies' damage taken within Lupine Aura by [[25%]] and increases their Haste by [[15]].
Reduces the allies' damage taken within Lupine Aura by [[25%]] and increases their Haste by [[20]].
Reduces the allies' damage taken within Lupine Aura by [[25%]] and increases their Haste by [[25]].

Shakir launches 3 consecutive strikes at an enemy, dealing [[90%]]<ATK> damage with his first 2 attacks and [[160%]] damage with his 3rd attack. While in Wolf Form, this skill damages enemies within a frontal 1-tile arc.
The 3rd attack deals [[180%]] damage.
The 3rd attack deals [[200%]] damage.
The 3rd attack deals [[220%]] damage.
Passive. Shakir gains [[25]] Ranged DEF. In Wolf Form, he is [[unaffected|uncontrol]] and gains [[30]] Life Drain. Each non-summoned ally within Lupine Aura will also grants him [[5%]] ATK.
Increases passive Life Drain bonus to [[40]].
Increases passive Ranged DEF bonus to [[30]].
The bonus ATK from each non-summoned ally within Lupine Aura is increased to [[7.5%]].
Shakir reduces his damage taken by [[9%]] during battle. His damage taken is further reduced by [[4%]] if at least 2 non-summoned allies are buffed by his Lupine Aura.
Shakir reduces his damage taken by [[12%]] during battle. His damage taken is further reduced by [[5%]] if at least 2 non-summoned allies are buffed by his Lupine Aura.
Shakir reduces his damage taken by [[15%]] during battle. His damage taken is further reduced by [[7%]] if at least 2 non-summoned allies are buffed by his Lupine Aura.
Shakir can cast his Ultimate once his Energy exceeds [[700]]. Shakir stays in Wolf Form and consumes no Energy within [[5]]s each time after casting the Ultimate.
Shakir stays in Wolf Form and consumes no Energy within [[7]]s each time after casting his Ultimate.
Each non-summoned ally within Lupine Aura can share the same bonus ATK from Wolf's Will.
Shakir stays in Wolf Form and consumes no Energy within [[8]]s each time after casting his Ultimate.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, gains [[15]] Penetration and [[15]] Haste for [[5]]s when a battle starts and when [[assisting or defeating|takedown]] an enemy.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Haste, 10 DEF Penetration.

d: Shakir reduces the target's Vitality by [[60]] within [[4]]s using the 3rd hit of Savage Cleave.
